hero.name: John Doe
hero.title: Full-Stack Developer
hero.subtitle: Passionate about technology, focused on building elegant, high-performance web applications. With 5 years of frontend development experience, dedicated to turning ideas into exceptional digital experiences.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: My background and experience
about.bio: I'm a passionate full-stack developer with a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science. Outside of work, I enjoy open source projects, technical writing, and photography. I believe technology can change the world and always maintain enthusiasm for exploring new technologies.

jobs.desc: Responsible for core product frontend architecture design and development, leading a 5-person team to complete multiple key projects.
Participated in frontend development of the company's main product lines, building complex interactive interfaces with React technology stack.

items.title: E-Commerce Platform Redesign
items.desc: Rebuilt legacy e-commerce platform with React + TypeScript, improving performance by 60% and greatly enhancing user experience.

items.title: Real-Time Collaboration Tool
items.desc: WebSocket-based real-time collaborative document editor supporting multi-user editing and commenting.

items.title: AI Chat Assistant
items.desc: Intelligent chat application integrating LLM, supporting multi-turn conversations, file uploads, and knowledge base retrieval.

items.title: Personal Blog System
items.desc: Markdown-based static blog system supporting tag categorization, full-text search, and RSS feeds.

posts.title: A Comprehensive Guide to React 19 New Features

posts.excerpt: Tailwind CSS v4 adopts a brand new CSS-first configuration approach. This article details the steps and considerations for migrating from v3 to v4.
